description: Sync Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM contacts, accounts, leads, opportunities, and activities into the Shielva knowledge base via the Dataverse Web API.

install_fields.label: Application (client) ID
install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview → Application (client) ID

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets → Client secrets

install_fields.label: Azure AD Tenant ID
install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview → Tenant ID

install_fields.label: Dynamics 365 Instance URL
install_fields.help: Your Dynamics 365 environment URL. Found in Power Platform Admin Center → Environments → your env → Environment URL.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: OAuth callback URL. Must match the redirect URI registered in your Azure AD app.
